tasks.title: Validate pending outputs
tasks.prompt: Review all outputs in agents/results/ not yet validated. For each: correctness check, compliance check (no sanction exposure, no fabricated data, no overclaiming), security check for code. Verdict PASS/FAIL with reasons. FAILs route back to the producing department.

tasks.title: EOD auditor report
tasks.prompt: Compile the end-of-day auditor report: PRs merged, CI status, test coverage deltas (unit/fuzz/invariant), compliance events, incidents, and a PASS/FAIL verdict on the day's output. This goes to the CEO review queue.
